title: Munch & Crunch Serrano Ham Dog Treats With Turkey, Bumper Box 12 Bags
features: TREAT & REWARD: Munch & Crunch Serrano Ham Treats with Chicken, exciting, mini chunky cross shaped treats, nutritious and full of flavour, ideal way to treat your dog as part of a balanced diet. Perfect for training and rewarding your pet.
TASTY DOG TREAT: Munch & Crunch Serrano Ham Treats with Turkey, deliciously tasty, healthy treat. Extra meaty, the perfect reward

NUTRITIOUS & FULL OF FLAVOUR: Munch & Crunch Extra Meaty Serrano Ham Treats with Turkey, feed as a treat or reward anytime, as part of a well balanced diet, Not suitable for puppies under 4 months old. Always supervise when feeding and keep fresh water available
STORAGE: Before and after opening keep in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight. Once opened always re-seal ready for next use.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Munch & Crunch Serrano Ham Dog Treats with Turkey, each bag 200g. Supplied as bumper sized box of 12 bags.
description: Product Description Munch & Crunch Serrano Ham Treats with Turkey, deliciously tasty, healthy treat. Extra meaty, the perfect reward. Munch & Crunch Extra Meaty Serrano Ham Treats with Turkey, feed as a treat or reward anytime, as part of a well balanced diet. Not suitable for puppies under 4 months old. Always supervise when feeding and keep fresh water available. Before and after opening keep in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight. Once opened always re-seal ready for next use. Munch & Crunch Serrano Ham Dog Treats with Turkey, each bag 200g. Supplied as bumper sized box of 12 bags. Indications Adult Ingredients 40% Serrano Ham Meat, 20% Chicken Meat, 12% Turkey Meat, Rice, Vegetal Glycerin, Green Peas, Sunflower Oil, Minerals. Directions Always supervise when feeding and keep fresh water available. Please adjust the main meal accordingly. See more
